### The Litigation Cases (Both Favour Khushbu)
Both NCLAT cases show Khushbu as an assertive **creditor** recovering commercial dues from defaulting buyers who stopped payment on cheques — a sign of healthy credit management, not a concern. Products in the cases: ethanol, ethyl acetate, IPA, toluene, MIBK, acetone — all confirmed product types.
